scoring_factors.notes: RHEL 7 EOL, Python 3.9 EOL (Oct 2025), Tomcat 6.1 EOL (Dec 2016), PostgreSQL 13 EOL (Nov 2025) - all 4 components EOL
Low business criticality analytics/reporting platform; limited operational impact if unavailable
3-Tier architecture is well-structured; already modular open source stack
AWS deployment, single server, containerized, CI/CD - excellent infrastructure maturity
Only 3 external interfaces, 8 API endpoints; low integration complexity
Already containerized with CI/CD; best deployment maturity in portfolio
Multiple EOL components require coordinated upgrades but open source nature enables self-managed upgrades

rationale: AnalyticsApp-003 scores medium complexity despite having all 4 technology components at EOL status. The low business criticality, excellent deployment maturity (containerized, CI/CD, AWS), 3-Tier architecture, and open source nature make component upgrades achievable without high risk. The main challenge is coordinating upgrades of RHEL 7, Python 3.9, Tomcat 6.1, and PostgreSQL 13 simultaneously while maintaining analytics service availability. The single server deployment and minimal external interfaces further reduce complexity.
